content:
# SPY Trade Journal

**Date:** July 2, 2026

## Today's Result

**P/L:** **-$100**

## What Went Wrong

Today I broke my trading rules and took a setup that was **not a B Trade**. Instead of waiting for all my confirmation signals, I entered early and paid the price.

## My B Trade Checklist

A trade qualifies as a **B Trade** only when **ALL** of the following conditions are met:

* ✅ Trend line break
* ✅ AK MACD is in the same direction as the trade
* ✅ Squeeze Momentum is in the same direction
* ✅ QQQ ADD confirms the same direction

**If any one of these conditions is missing, it is NOT a B Trade.**

## Lesson Learned

The $100 loss was not caused by the market—it was caused by not following my plan. My edge comes from trading only high-probability setups. Every time I ignore my checklist, I reduce that edge.

## Commitment

Starting tomorrow, I will only take **B Trades**. I will not enter a trade until every item on my B Trade Checklist is confirmed.
